author: CasaOS Team
description: Alternative implementation of the Bitwarden server API written in Rust and compatible with upstream Bitwarden clients*, perfect for self-hosted deployment where running the official resource-heavy service might not be ideal.
releaseNotes:
- 1.32.7 includes a security fix for installations with ORG_GROUPS_ENABLED enabled.
- SMTP image source values are masked in the support string.
- Refactoring, optimizations, connect-src entry support, and updated fern usage are included.
title: Vaultwarden
